title: Boss Checklist - Scorched Guns 2 Compatibility
description: Integrates all raid bosses as well as the Scamppanzer from Scorched Guns 2 as entries in the Boss Checklist mod.
body:
This is an addon mod for both [Scorched Guns 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/scorched-guns-2) and [Boss Checklist](https://modrinth.com/mod/boss-checklist) that integrates all of the former's raid bosses as well as the Scamppanzer into the latter's boss checklist interface as entries.


 

**"How did you make this work? Scorched Guns 2 utilizes vanilla mobs to base its raid bosses off of!"**
To begin with, the mod adds fake, unspawnable stand-in entities which act as the foundation for the boss checklist entries you see. Each entry is automatically marked as defeated once their corresponding boss is detected to have died in the world at any point.

**"Why isn't this bundled with your other Boss Checklist addons?"**
This mod uses aforementioned fake entities that are added by this mod itself. Thus, all boss entries (save for Scamppanzer's) added by this mod will appear regardless of whether or not you actually have the Scorched Guns 2 mod installed. You wouldn't want a modpack where players would go around curiously searching for any of these bosses only to figure out later down the line that they do not even have the mod supposedly accommodating them installed in the first place.
